answer: Datadog provides a free tier that allows monitoring for up to five hosts with one-day metric retention [1][2]. While Datadog offers a 14-day free trial of the full platform [3][2], the permanent free tier is limited in scope and does not include full access to all features or unlimited API capabilities. Access to the Datadog API is a standard platform feature, but usage of specific services like Synthetic Monitoring is billed based on consumption, such as the number of API test runs executed [4][5]. You can sign up for these tiers via the Datadog website for self-serve access [6][3].
